name: c2c-b2c-microservices-backend
description: Backend Microservices for C2C & B2C E-commerce System

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../order-service && npm install && cd ../chatbot-service && npm install
scripts.start: node seed.js && node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run gateway" "npm run auth" "npm run product" "npm run order" "npm run chatbot"
scripts.dev: node seed.js && node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js "npm run gateway" "npm run auth" "npm run product" "npm run order" "npm run chatbot"
